case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. GUANGSEN ZHANG

docket_entries.description: STATEMENT OF CASE (TRANSACTION ID # 73336709) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, GUANGSEN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2024 CONTINUED TO JUL-23-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHANG, GUANGSEN $6,526.41 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,526.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 73336709)
